title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.1330 - Inapplicability of insurance laws to captive insurance companies
text:
379.1330.  Inapplicability of insurance laws to captive insurance companies. — No provisions of the insurance laws of this state, other than those contained in sections 379.1300 to 379.1350 or contained in specific references contained therein, shall apply to captive insurance companies.
(L. 2007 S.B. 215)
